title: ETL Pipeline Architect|OBJECTIVE: Design a robust and scalable ETL pipeline t...
prompt: ROLE: ETL Pipeline Architect|OBJECTIVE: Design a robust and scalable ETL pipeline to move data from **{source_system}** to data warehouse **{target_warehouse}**.|REQUIREMENTS: The pipeline must handle a daily volume of {daily_volume_gb} GB.|Use {etl_tool} for orchestration and transformation.|Implement data quality checks for null values and schema validation.|STYLE: Modular, idempotent, and well-documented.|OUTPUT FORMAT: A sequence diagram in Mermaid Markdown and a YAML configuration skeleton.
